name: Dare Duel
mechanic: Tap to send a dare-link to one friend; both of you get exactly one 60-second run. The higher score wins and the loser gets a 'settled' stamp. The dare closes after both play — no ladder, just the score.

name: Percentile Chase
mechanic: One 90-second run. At the end the game shows your percentile against everyone who played today. Cross the 90th percentile and it generates a dare-link to challenge the next player above you.

name: Head-to-Head Sprint
mechanic: Two players open the same dare-link and race split-screen for 45 seconds on identical targets. The winner keeps a session-only crown sticker; the loser sees 'next time' and the session closes.

name: Top Ten Today
mechanic: Play once. If your score lands in today's top 10% you get a gold badge and a dare-link to challenge the player directly above you. The ranking resets tomorrow; nothing persists beyond the day.

name: Clout Ladder
mechanic: A 10-rung ladder appears; each rung is a one-shot micro-challenge. Reach the top rung in one session, then dare a friend to knock you off in a single attempt. The ladder vanishes after the dare is settled.

name: Follower Face-Off
mechanic: You and a friend each get 60 seconds to accept the right follower notifications and reject bots. First to the milestone wins; the dare-link encodes both scores and a single winner flag.

name: Leaderboard Snap
mechanic: Play a 30-second round. The game renders a one-time leaderboard image with your score and three empty friend slots. Share it as a dare; friends beat it or not, then the snap expires and is no longer valid.

name: Score Tag
mechanic: Finish a run, then tap a friend's handle to tag them in a dare-link. They get exactly one attempt to beat your score; after that the tag is settled and the link goes dead.

name: Crown Match
mechanic: A single head-to-head duel: tap rapidly to keep a crown in your half of the screen. After 30 seconds the crown holder wins and earns a session-only crown emoji to stamp the dare-link.

name: Beat the Seed
mechanic: A dare-link plants a 'seed score' from the sender. You get one 60-second run to beat it. Win and you uproot the seed; lose and the seed stands. The seed travels with the link and dies after one reply.

name: Rank Roulette
mechanic: You have one ranked bet per session: choose a shareable score, then tap to stop a spinning multiplier. Beat your bet and the dare-link upgrades; lose and the link shows the honest result with no retry.

name: Dare Chain
mechanic: A friend dares you; beat their score and the link auto-updates with your score so you dare the next friend. The chain stops after five links or when someone fails — the final score is the chain record.

name: Percentile Poker
mechanic: Play one round blind, then bet whether your score sits in the top 50%, 25%, or 10% of today's dares. Reveal, win the bet, and send the dare-link. Wrong bet ends the session with no share.

name: Trophy Dash
mechanic: Race a friend through a 60-second obstacle course; trophies spawn on the path. Most trophies at the finish wins the dare. Both players see the identical course, so the better run takes it.

name: Clout Check
mechanic: A friend's score appears as a blue-check dare. Tap to attempt the same 30-second challenge once. The game stamps 'verified' if you beat it, 'not verified' if you don't — one try, then the dare is settled.

name: Speed Bracket
mechanic: A dare-link starts a 4-player bracket. Each match is one 30-second thumb duel; winners advance, losers are out. The bracket resolves in under 3 minutes and the winner holds the bracket badge.

name: Score Shield
conditioned_path: defending a pinned top comment / rank
mechanic: Set a score as your 'shield' and share the link. Challengers get one run to break it. If they fail, your shield stands; if they win, their score becomes the new shield and you get one notification, then it's done.

name: Viral Dare
conditioned_path: watching a post's view count explode
mechanic: You post a dare; every friend who opens the link adds to a view counter. The goal is to make the dare 'go viral' among your friends within a single day, then the link dies — a bounded popularity contest.

name: Rank or Tank
mechanic: One 60-second round, no retries. Your score maps to a single session rank badge — Bronze, Silver, or Gold. Share the badge as a dare; the receiver must also play one round and either outrank you or tank.

name: Knockout Dare
mechanic: A dare-link sends one tough round. Both players get exactly one attempt. Higher score survives; lower score is knocked out. The dare auto-expires once both have played, so the result is final.
